title: Card and Money
description: This mod adds coins to the game, creating an economy!
body:
# 🪪 Card and Money
---
[![Join our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/074fa02cb8708dd32f365967978fbb5a818c93af_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/DKtuXPq8fE)
---
This mod introduce stone, copper and iron coins (for now)!
First, you need to craft a stone coin, combine four of them to create a copper coin. Then, to create an iron coin you need to combine four copper coins.
This mod is **work-in-progress**. More features will be **coming soon**!
